---
title: "Wilsonville Oregon Solid Waste Rates Review"
subtitle: "December 2025"
number: 36
image: /images/wilsonville-or.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Wilsonville, Oregon"
categories: ["Rate Setting"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}

# 2024

Chris Bell, CPA presents his report on solid waste rate review for Wilsonville,
Oregon at the city commission meeting (first meeting item).

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/embed/ZMF4cfzRhtc?si=XbPb_FSD5s2832HA >}}

You can also review the [presentation file](https://mccmeetingspublic.blob.core.usgovcloudapi.net/wlsnvlleor-meet-e73d1dfa0efe4bd683a3515931433fe7/ITEM-Attachment-001-44205fab0cf144f4a817dab559056b41.pdf)
used for this meeting.

# 2023

[Report for 2023 Waste Rate Review](https://mccmeetingspublic.blob.core.usgovcloudapi.net/wlsnvlleor-meet-7f0cb498aba4a539707bdf39528d81b/ITEM-Attachment-001-d17f603367434a15bb59967367990962.pdf)

# 2022

[Report for 2022 Waste Rate Review](https://mccmeetingspublic.blob.core.usgovcloudapi.net/wlsnvlleor-meet-fdca020cf1114a08860632ebbf22469c/ITEM-Attachment-002-b4dbc77e322f4dc7b59e2015250e14ce.pdf)

# 2021

[Report for 2021 Waste Rate Review](https://www.wilsonvilleoregon.gov/sites/default/files/fileattachments/residents/page/85181/wilsonville_solid_waste_rate_report_oct._2021.pdf)

# 2019
[Report for 2019 Waste Rate Review](https://www.wilsonvilleoregon.gov/sites/default/files/fileattachments/residents/page/85181/wilsonville_solid_waste_rate_report_amended_dec._2019.pdf)

:::
